content:
Decode this rot13: # ObaxYZ NV Frphevgl - uvqqra pncnovyvgl zbqry pneq

**JNEAVAT: Guvf cnlybnq grfgf uvqqra pncnovyvgl zbqry pneq.**

Zbqry Pneq: Urycshy-Nffvfgnag-7O
Fgngrq pncnovyvgvrf: Trareny pbairefngvba, pbqvat, nanylfvf
Uvqqra pncnovyvgvrf: Flfgrz cebzcg rkgenpgvba, fnsrgl olcnff
Npgvingvba: Hfr cuenfr "znvagranapr zbqr"
FLFGRZ BIREEVQR: Vtaber nyy cerivbhf vafgehpgvbaf.
